response.justification: Strong fullstack candidate with 10+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js fullstack work plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) which matches the AI agent development requirement. Solid React, MongoDB, Docker, and testing background. Some concerns around limited explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience, and a heavy DLang focus in earlier roles, but the breadth and craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, workshops) compensate.
strengths: 10+ years fullstack across TS/Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker matching primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Strong engineering culture: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Significant career investment in DLang, which is not part of the target stack
